"You are the accumulation of your consistency. Every action you take defines who you are."

The Philosophy of Forge
Behavioural Intelligence

Your consistency,
made visible.

Forge is a behavioural intelligence platform that transforms your habits, training, movement, and emotional state into a coherent, living picture of who you are becoming. It tracks the fundamental drivers of personal growth and turns them into meaningful signals — not isolated statistics.

Movement & Training

Your exercise score reflects how well your physical behaviour aligns with the plan you set. It rewards execution and sustainable commitment over random volume.

Habits & Willpower

Your habit score measures how reliably you follow the behavioural structure you design — weighting avoidance of harm and completion of benefit as proof of willpower.

Mood & Adaptation

Mood tracking is the emotional compass of your journey — helping the system understand how your routines affect your wellbeing and when your plan needs refinement.

Discipline

Three scores.
One truth.

Exercise, habit adherence, and mood — combined into a discipline score that reflects how closely your actions align with the person you are trying to become.

Premium Analytics

Patterns that reveal
your trajectory.

The free plan shows you outcomes. Premium reveals the intelligence behind them — behavioural harmony, training response, recovery dynamics, and consistency landscapes that explain not just what you did, but how it shaped you.

Discipline Map & Forge Days
Training Spark & Movement Alignment
Habit Yield & Behavioural Harmony
Recovery Dynamics & Iron Days
See Premium plans →

Discipline compounds.

What you measure improves.

Consistency becomes your identity.

Simple Pricing

Choose your path.

Start free and build self-awareness. Upgrade to Premium for deep behavioural insights — patterns, trajectories, and analytics that reveal not just what you did, but how it shaped you.

The platform is designed to become adaptive over time — with weighting, insights, and social tools that evolve alongside your behavioural data.
